title: UML Models Supplementing the Use Case Diagram
description: A hierarchical diagram showing the core Use Case model and the four primary UML diagrams that elaborate on its details, providing a complete view of system functionality.
relationships: The Use Case Diagram is the central model that describes high-level system functionality and actors. Activity Diagrams elaborate on the workflow of a use case. Sequence Diagrams detail the interaction between objects over time for a scenario. Communication Diagrams show object interactions focused on links. State Machine Diagrams model the lifecycle and state changes of a key object within a use case.
